listOfQuestions.question: Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: An extended speech by one performer?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: A script note describing action, movement, or setting?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Planned movement and positioning of actors?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: A signal for an actor or technician to act?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: An object handled or used by performers?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: The physical environment built for a performance?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Clothing worn by performers to support character and setting?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Planning light to shape visibility, mood, and focus?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Planning audio elements for a production?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: The person guiding artistic choices in a production?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: The person coordinating rehearsals and live performance logistics?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Practice time used to prepare a performance?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Creating performance material spontaneously?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Choices that create a believable character?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Using voice so an audience can hear clearly?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Performers working together as a group?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: A transition from one staged moment or setting to another?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Performers returning to receive audience applause?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: The written text of a performance?
Which Theatre and Performance concept is described by this clue: Words spoken by characters?
